aggregate_score.headline: Industry-leading claim settlement ratio (99.1%) with low complaints (15 per 10K) and strong YouTube/advisor recommendation
aggregate_score.computation_notes: 0.40*99.10 + 0.20*(100-30) + 0.15*(4.45*20) + 0.10*75 + 0.10*90 + 0.05*100 = 39.6 + 14 + 13.4 + 7.5 + 9 + 5 = 88.5. Adjusted to 85.7 accounting for Trustpilot drag and some negative emergency-claim anecdotes.
